note: If/then fill logic (authored + derived): conditional-required, attachment/companion-form triggers, value incompatibilities, and value inferences. Warnings-only — evaluated by tools/logic_engine.py at preflight/fill time; nothing here blocks or alters a fill. Not legal advice.

rules.message: The maximum withholding cannot exceed 25% of disposable earnings (line 4). Wage garnishment is capped at the lesser of 25% of disposable earnings or the amount over 40x the minimum wage.
The maximum withholding cannot exceed the judgment debtor's disposable earnings (line 3).
